text:
Welcome to SMAUG 2.0!

This is the Message of the Day.
Type 'help' for a list of topics.

Syntax: look
        look <object>
        look <character>
        look <direction>
        look in <container>

LOOK without arguments shows you the room you are in, including
exits, objects on the ground, and other characters present.

LOOK at an object or character shows you a description of that
thing. LOOK in a container shows the contents.

LOOK in a direction shows the exit description and door state.

keywords: MOVEMENT NORTH SOUTH EAST WEST UP DOWN
text:
Syntax: north, south, east, west, up, down
        n, s, e, w, u, d

Use these commands to move in the indicated direction.
Movement costs vary by terrain type. You must have enough
movement points to travel. Resting and sleeping restore
movement points over time.

Syntax: score

Displays your full character sheet including:
  - Name, level, race, class, sex
  - HP, Mana, Movement points
  - All stats (Str/Int/Wis/Dex/Con/Cha/Lck)
  - Combat stats (hitroll, damroll, armor)
  - Wealth, experience, alignment
  - Active affects count

Syntax: who
        who -r <race>
        who -c <class>
        who -l <min level>
        who -g <clan>
        who -i

Displays a list of currently online players.
Use filters to narrow down the list:
  -r  Filter by race
  -c  Filter by class
  -l  Filter by minimum level
  -g  Filter by clan
  -i  Show only immortals

Syntax: where
        where <name>

Without arguments, shows all visible players in your area.
With a name, searches for that player or mob in the area.

Syntax: examine <object>

EXAMINE shows you a detailed view of an object, including
weapon damage, armor class, container capacity, and other
item-specific information.

Syntax: inventory

Shows a list of all items you are carrying.
Identical items are grouped with a count.

Syntax: equipment

Shows all items you are currently wearing or wielding,
organized by wear location.

Syntax: affects

Shows all magical affects currently active on your character,
including the spell name, modifier, and remaining duration.

Syntax: consider <target>

Compares your level and hit points to a target mob,
giving you an idea of how difficult the fight would be.

keywords: OPEN CLOSE LOCK UNLOCK PICK DOORS
text:
Syntax: open <direction|door|container>
        close <direction|door|container>
        lock <direction|door>
        unlock <direction|door>
        pick <direction|door>

Door manipulation commands. LOCK and UNLOCK require the
appropriate key. PICK attempts to unlock without a key
but may fail depending on skill and door difficulty.

Syntax: flee

Attempts to escape from combat by running to a random
adjacent room. On success, you lose some experience points.
You must be fighting to use this command.

Syntax: recall

Teleports you to your recall point (usually the temple).
Costs half of your current movement points.
Cannot be used in no-recall rooms.

Syntax: enter <portal>
        leave

ENTER allows you to step into a portal object to be
transported to another location.
LEAVE attempts to exit from an indoor location.

Syntax: time

Shows the current in-game time and date.

Syntax: weather

Shows the current weather conditions in your area.
You must be outdoors to see the weather.
